hero.detalhe: We take care of every detail so your experience is truly unique.

servicos.atendimentoDesc: Professionals trained to the highest standards of courtesy and efficiency.
servicos.segurancaDesc: 24/7 monitoring with AI cameras and real-time incident detection.
servicos.equipeDesc: A team passionate about precision, from valet to manager.
servicos.techDesc: Self-service totems, license plate reading, and digital occupancy control.

mensalista.desc1: Having a monthly plan at Park Real guarantees peace of mind every day. Enjoy priority access, VIP service, and the certainty that your vehicle is in the safest place.
mensalista.vagaGarantidaDesc: Your exclusive spot, always available 24 hours a day.
mensalista.segurancaPremiumDesc: Continuous monitoring and a dedicated team to protect your vehicle.
mensalista.acessoLivreDesc: Fast entry and exit via automated systems and smart totems.
mensalista.faleEquipe: Speak directly with our team via WhatsApp to check current rates and availability.

localizacao.luxoEncontra: Where luxury meets convenience in the heart of São Paulo.
localizacao.horariosValue:
Monday to Friday: 07h to 22h
Saturday and Sunday: 08h to 20h

contato.equipeDisposicao: Our team is available for premium support.
contato.estamosProntos: We are ready to assist you. Choose your preferred channel.
